reviews.review_description: Download and it doesn’t play don’t bother

Why on earth does the beginning of this flight simulator ￼include “news” coverage of a plane ￼ crash in horrible details? How is someone who is supposed to be trying to get over their fear ￼ of flying supposed to move past this to get to the actual simulation?

It’s helping me with my fear of flying. I’m still in the trial version but may pay for the subscription if it really helps. The only thing I’d change so far is not to have the constant repeating of plane crash news videos when you log into the airport terminal. People who are scared to fly don’t want to see that before boarding a plane. Please remove it so we aren’t scared.

reviews.review_title: when is the game ever i love it
reviews.review_description: it talks about so much about playing then i love planes

Why on earth would you use scare tactics when you are supposed to be helping someone who is afraid of flying , as soon as I put this on it started talking about plane crashes please please don’t do that it doesn’t make sense

reviews.review_title: They need to change the name to garbage
reviews.review_description:
I've had it with whatever this is supposed to be. You just sit there, forever, nothing happening, and people just walk by. You're stuck just sitting there, sitting there, sitting there! And then, it has the nerve to keep nagging you for a rating. A rating for what? It doesn’t even tell you, give you any context, just nothing. Whatever these so-called developers were attempting, they miserably failed. It's complete garbage, and probably the worst I’ve ever seen.

I was so bored, I ended up falling asleep just waiting, presumably for the plane to be loaded or something. Can someone explain what the developers were thinking? It's like they dumpster-dived, fished out the most revolting piece of trash, and decided to pawn it off. And don’t even get me started on how it's not even passable trash—more like a wadded-up napkin someone puked on. 

The only thing more atrocious than this was the Twisted Metal VR game. At least with this travesty, you don’t have to pay to experience the sheer waste of time it is—if you consider your time worthless, that is. I sure as hell don’t!
